title.en: Details, e.g. functional units (individual logic elements F15C; valves F16K)
having at least one moving part, e.g. spool valve
Computing devices characterised by the interrelationship of the functional units and having at least one moving part
Computing devices characterised by the interrelationship of the functional units and having no moving parts
Computing devices characterised by the combination of hydraulic or pneumatic functional elements with at least one other type of functional element
